Params: {1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory748.jpg'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Customer A', 3: 'What a rain last night, eh?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'We were almost trapped here.', 3: '6'}
{2: 'Customer A', 3: 'You worked until that late?', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Before the sun sets, a familiar face has already appeared around the counter.'}
{3: 'A small talk first, as usual, and then he wastes no time in cutting to the chase.'}
{2: 'Customer A', 3: 'How\'s the thing with Sykes?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Weren\'t you here yesterday?', 3: '11'}
{2: 'Customer A', 3: 'I\'m asking if anything happened afterward. He didn\'t ambush you at the door?', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Noctis', 3: 'If he\'s ever got the nerve to pull that, I\'ll show him how the ingredients of the "Wanderer\'s Biscuits" are hammered into the dough.', 4: '2'}
{3: 'Noctis\' head emerges from the small window of the kitchen, his cheek adorned with crumbs and a dusting of powder.'}
{2: 'Customer A', 3: 'Noctis, you...', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Noctis', 3: 'Man, don\'t even get me started. I\'ve never struggled this much to fry something up.', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Noctis', 3: 'I swear, all I did was quickly wipe my face, and when I opened my eyes, that thing was already charcoal-black.', 4: '2'}
{1: 'DialogDisable'}
{2: '(Take a towel)', 3: '25'}
{2: '(Wipe Noctis\' face for him)', 3: '27'}
{2: 'Noctis', 3: 'Right side, my hair...', 4: '2'}
{2: 'How about you turn your head...', 3: '29'}
{2: 'Noctis', 3: 'Oh... Like this?', 4: '2'}
{2: 'I wiped them all.', 3: '31'}
{2: 'Noctis', 3: 'Thanks, Commandant. I feel much better now.', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Noctis', 3: 'I\'m gonna give it another shot, and you guys can help me taste \'em and be the judges.', 4: '2'}
{3: 'After the window is closed, you can hear a faint sizzling sound emanating from the kitchen.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Customer A', 3: 'What a pain... 【kuroname】, can I have a Big Bang Mars, please?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Sure, give me a minute.', 3: '40'}
{3: 'Abruptly, the door of Vegetable Stew is smacked open.'}
{2: 'Customer A', 3: 'Are you out of your freakin\' mind? I thought Sykes and his men were here.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Customer B', 3: 'Something\'s funky about that door. It always gets stuck when I push it. Hey, 【kuroname】, I think the hinges could probably use some oil.', 4: '2'}
{1: 'DialogDisable'}
{2: 'Alright, I\'ll get it handled tonight.', 3: '49'}
{2: 'What do you feel like today?', 3: '50'}
{2: 'Customer B', 3: 'I\'ll just have a beer.', 4: '2'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Female Customer', 3: 'Hey! Didn\'t you say that you couldn\'t stand hanging out with Babylonia people? Look who\'s been showing up every single night lately!', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Customer B', 3: 'This is the Gray Raven Commandant, not some Parliament hypocrite. You\'ve got a problem with that?!', 4: '2'}
{3: 'As if adding fuel to the fire, the loud chat between acquaintances across the room renders the atmosphere even more heated.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Noctis', 3: 'What happened? We have provokers again?', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Noctis hurriedly sticks his head out to check the situation in the tavern.'}
{2: 'Noctis', 3: 'Hey, the tavern\'s as lively as usual.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Female Customer', 3: 'Noctis!', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Female Customer', 3: 'Can you give us a little surprise?', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Noctis', 3: 'Surprise... Commandant, what is surprise?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'They probably want something different.', 3: '74'}
{2: 'Noctis', 3: 'Hm... Then, how about the potato pancake I created before?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Oh, so you\'ve been working on that lately?', 3: '77'}
{2: 'Noctis', 3: 'What? No, I haven\'t really got any free time for that, so let\'s do a test round...', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Noctis', 3: 'Comman-um-dant, stop! I wan\'t (can\'t) mreathe (breathe).', 4: '1'}
{3: 'You cover Noctis\' face with the towel and wipe it with the determination to erase all the words he just uttered.'}
{1: 'DialogDisable'}
{2: 'Just make something normal.', 3: '83'}
{2: 'Something that won\'t get me called out and need me to apologize to people.', 3: '84'}
{2: 'Noctis', 3: 'Okay, okay, copy that.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Noctis flinches back into the kitchen and closes the little window.'}

{3: 'The brief commotion between the two of you unexpectedly elevates the atmosphere of the entire tavern to a climactic level. In a spirited response, everyone around raises their glasses in joyful celebration.'}
{3: 'Once the universal celebration subsides, the crowd naturally disperses into smaller groups, engaging in lively chitchats and conversations.'}
{3: 'Amidst the applause and laughter, even the mundane trivialities have become the finest condiments of the night.'}
{3: 'As you observe this scene filled with delight, you can\'t help but gently caress the names imprinted on your apron: Vegetable Stew and 【kuroname】...'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Customer A', 3: 'Geez, who is it this time? Is the door this hard to open?', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Sykes', 3: 'My apologies. We\'ve got quite a crowd here, so I gotta make sure the door\'s wide open.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Those frigid words suddenly quench the vibrant flame within Vegetable Stew like a bowl of ice-cold water.'}
{3: 'It seems that Sykes came with more people this time.'}
{2: 'Didn\'t we agree on keeping the time limit to one week?', 3: '106'}
{2: 'Sykes', 3: 'We did, but does it have anything to do with me eating here?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Sykes', 3: '"Wanderer\'s Biscuits" and a beer, please.', 4: '1'}
{1: 'DialogDisable'}
{2: 'Sure. I\'ll get back to you soon.', 3: '111'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory748.jpg'}
{3: 'To save time, you directly leave the counter and look for Noctis in the kitchen.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Noctis', 3: 'Anything wrong, Commandant? Why do I feel things have quieted down outside?', 4: '1'}
{3: 'The Wanderer\'s Biscuits, floating up and down in the bubbling oil, have occupied all Noctis\' attention, which has prevented him from sticking his head out and checking the situation outside.'}
{2: 'Noctis', 3: 'Huh? What is he doing here? Didn\'t he agree on the time limit of one week?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'The guy said he\'s here for food and ordered Wanderer\'s Biscuits...', 3: '122'}
{2: 'Noctis', 3: 'I nailed it right on time. Check \'em out, Commandant! Lookin\' good this time, huh?', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Noctis removes the biscuits from the oil and arranges them on the plate, creating a simple yet visually appealing presentation.'}
{2: 'Should I... serve these to him?', 3: '128'}
{2: 'Noctis', 3: 'I\'ll go. You stay behind me, Commandant.', 4: '1'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory748.jpg'}
{3: 'After you return to the front...'}
{2: 'Sykes', 3: 'That was fast.', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Noctis', 3: 'Thanks to someone, I\'ve been busy the whole night.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Sykes picks up a biscuit.'}
{2: 'Sykes', 3: 'Not burnt at all?', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Noctis', 3: 'Don\'t even bother this time. I\'ve paid close attention, and I\'m not gonna let you pick on my dish again.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Sykes', 3: 'Smells good. What ingredients did you use?', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Noctis', 3: 'Supplies from the conservation area, of course. Can\'t tell you the details, though.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Observing Sykes as he meticulously surveys the biscuits on the plate, a sense of relief washes over you.'}
{3: 'The Wanderer\'s Biscuits made by Noctis this time are emanating a tantalizing aroma, not quite reaching the level of irresistible, yet undeniably appetizing.'}
{3: 'However...'}
{2: 'Sykes', 3: 'This is not what I\'m looking for.', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Sykes', 3: 'Just another piece of junk that you use to manipulate your customers.', 4: '2'}
{3: 'Sykes tosses the biscuit back onto the plate and dumps some Black Cards on the table.'}
{2: 'Sykes', 3: 'Here\'s the payment.', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Noctis', 3: 'You piece of—!', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Unfazed by Noctis closing in menacingly, Sykes remains steadfast. He even motions for his companions, who are ready to step in and protect him, to stand down.'}

{2: 'Sykes', 3: 'Gray Raven Commandant, you better keep your Construct restrained. I\'m pretty sure no regulation in the Clean Zone backs up a Construct going around and yelling at people for no reason.', 4: '2'}
{1: 'DialogDisable'}
{2: 'Noctis, keep your cool.', 3: '158'}
{3: 'Then you lean close to Noctis and whisper to him by his ear.'}
{1: 'DialogDisable'}
{2: 'Too many people around. Without the owner here, we better leave him be.', 3: '161'}
{2: 'Everyone is watching. Don\'t forget you\'re a member of the Task Force.', 3: '162'}
{3: 'Seeing that you\'ve halted Noctis\' action, Sykes takes the opportunity to compose himself, smoothing out his slightly disheveled attire.'}
{3: 'Then, with a simple wave of his hand, he signals his men, beckoning them to leave with him.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory748.jpg'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Owner', 3: 'Is he trying to back us into a corner or something?', 4: '1'}
{3: 'The owner, having been gone for a whole day, finally returns to the tavern late at night.'}
{3: 'His frown remains unappeased as he examines the ledger.'}
{2: 'Still the same as yesterday?', 3: '176'}
{2: 'Owner', 3: 'No, it\'s much better than yesterday... but the atmosphere in the tavern is what I care about the most.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Owner', 3: 'If Sykes and his men keep showin\' up like this, we\'re gonna lose a ton of customers.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Do you want me to...', 3: '179'}
{2: 'Owner', 3: 'Don\'t worry. I\'ve been busting my ass all day to make sure he doesn\'t show up too often.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Owner', 3: 'I\'ve got it under control. Trust me, he won\'t have any free time to swing by in the next few days.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Owner', 3: 'Damn, it\'s late. Is Noctis still working in the kitchen?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'He\'s been glued to your note. I guess Sykes really bruised his ego.', 3: '183'}
{2: 'Owner', 3: 'I gotta say, Sykes is a tough guy to deal with. I owe him this time...', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Noctis', 3: 'Mind if I use the fish you brought back?!', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Owner', 3: 'Don\'t worry about the ingredients. Use whatever you want and give it all you\'ve got!', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Noctis', 3: 'Thanks! Commandant, we\'ll have tuna for dinner today!', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Owner', 3: 'I thought you were gonna use it for... I take it back!', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Noctis', 3: 'Too late, already in the pot. Smells freakin\' good!'}
{2: '(Try not to laugh)', 3: '199'}
{2: 'Owner', 3: 'Tch, the person who cares about him the most is right before me, acting all cool and normal. Why did I even bother?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Owner', 3: 'Sigh, I\'ll head back first. Don\'t push yourselves too hard, alright? See you tomorrow.', 4: '1'}

{2: 'Owner', 3: 'Hey, make sure to lock that door, alright? And you better not make me see a single piece of that fish leftover tomorrow. I put in some serious effort to get my hands on that bluefin tuna. Ugh... my fish...', 4: '1'}
{3: 'The whines slowly fade away into the darkness as his figure disappears from your sight.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Shortly after, Noctis comes out of the kitchen and brings the fish to you.'}
{2: 'Noctis', 3: 'What\'s up, Commandant? I\'ve let the fish sit for a bit, so it won\'t burn your mouth. Go ahead and dig in.', 4: '1'}
{1: 'DialogDisable'}
{2: 'You\'re not pushing yourself, aren\'t you?', 3: '212'}
{2: 'Noctis', 3: 'Commandant, what\'s going on? You\'re nagging me like the owner.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Noctis', 3: 'It\'s just some Wanderer\'s Biscuits. I\'ll keep trying until the dude\'s happy with my cooking. A fun challenge for life, eh?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Noctis', 3: 'I was seriously dying of boredom dealing with the same dishes day in and day out.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Alright. I\'m glad that you can see it this way.', 3: '216'}
{2: 'Noctis', 3: 'What about you, then? Are you pushing yourself too hard?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Noctis', 3: 'Every day, you put on that smiley face at the counter while making sure everyone\'s having a blast.', 4: '1'}
{1: 'DialogDisable'}
{2: 'This is my job as the receptionist and the bartender...', 3: '221'}
{2: 'I\'m fine as long as we don\'t have a guy like Sykes around.', 3: '222'}
{2: 'Noctis', 3: 'That sounds rough... How \'bout we switch things up? I\'m down to give working at the front a shot.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Well then, show me a smile first.', 3: '224'}
{2: 'Show me a smile, c\'mon.', 3: '227'}
{3: 'Though perplexed by your strange request, Noctis still manages to force out a smile.'}
{3: 'Somehow, it gives you an uncanny feeling, as if you just locked eyes with a great white shark.'}
{2: 'If you work at the front, you\'ll soon have the poor owner living on the streets.', 3: '231'}
{2: 'Noctis', 3: 'Wait, that actually sounds kinda fun.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Noctis', 3: 'But Commandant, why do I feel you\'re acting a bit weird?', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Quickly, Noctis grabs the glass from you and takes a sip—it\'s the modified version of the drink you designed before.'}
{2: 'Noctis', 3: 'This taste... What did you put in there, Commandant?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'I had a customer try the drink, and he suggested I throw in some α40 extract...', 3: '239'}
{2: 'Noctis', 3: 'α40 extract? Isn\'t that similar to alcohol...? Okay, I\'ll find out who gave you this brilliant idea.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Noctis', 3: 'Anyways, have some of the potato pancake I made.', 4: '1'}
{1: 'DialogDisable'}
{2: 'Oh, you improved your creation as well?', 3: '243'}
{2: 'I wonder what changes you\'ve made. Now I\'m getting excited.', 3: '244'}
{2: 'Noctis', 3: 'Don\'t get your expectations high. I haven\'t done all that much since we\'ve been swamped with those Wanderer\'s Biscuits.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Noctis', 3: 'So, it probably tastes the same as before...', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Noctis', 3: 'You doing okay, Commandant? Feeling any better after throwing up?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Noctis', 3: 'I\'m here... Sigh, slow down. That\'s a chair. What are you doing, Commandant?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Noctis', 3: 'Stop, stop, stop! This is the counter. Commandant, you gotta keep up appearances.', 4: '1'}
{1: 'DialogDisable'}
{2: 'After tonight, I\'ll be the only one who knows about this.', 3: '258'}
{2: 'Noctis', 3: 'Who on earth gave Commandant the crazy idea to drink α40 extract?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Noctis', 3: 'Hold on, Commandant, are you being serious right now?!', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Noctis', 3: 'Key... Where\'s the key...', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Don\'t you run away, Noctis!', 3: '263'}
{3: 'Even late at night, the commotion at Vegetable Stew never seems to settle down.'}
{1: '999', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory0.png', 3: '0', 4: '1', 5: '1'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory0.png'}
{3: 'For a long time afterward, whenever you try to dig into what went down that night, Noctis is either quick to change the subject or completely ignore you.'}
{3: 'Since he\'s not gonna spill the beans, it shouldn\'t be a big idea. You\'ll just take it as a lesson learned and move on.'}
{3: 'All in all, it was another peaceful day.'}
{2: 'Noctis? Is there any problem?', 3: '272'}
